name: flutter-app-manager
description: Local Codex plugin for managing Flutter applications.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect, run, test, build, and maintain Flutter apps.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex workflows for Flutter and Dart projects, including project discovery, dependency changes, asset wiring, platform builds, diagnostics, formatting, analysis, tests, and release-safety checks.
defaultPrompt: Check this Flutter app and explain issues.
Add a Flutter screen and wire navigation.
Build this Flutter app for web or Android.
